name: Sorg Shop
description: Come play pickleball at Sorg Shop in Silver Lake, IN! There are 4 hard courts. 3 are outdoors and 1 is indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are private.

name: Wabash County YMCA
description: Wabash County YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wabash, IN. There are 4 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include locker rooms, lights, wheelchair accessibility, water, and restrooms. A membership is required to play.
